name: DINO-X MCP Server
what_it_does: DINO-X MCP server from IDEA Research enabling AI agents to perform universal object detection and visual grounding — detecting any objects in images using open-vocabulary detection, grounding object descriptions to bounding boxes, and integrating DINO-X's state-of-the-art vision capabilities into agent-driven image analysis workflows.
use_cases: Detecting specific objects in images from computer vision agents
Visual grounding — locating described objects with bounding boxes from analysis agents
Open-vocabulary object detection for custom categories from ML agents
Image analysis for automated quality control from inspection agents
Building vision-language pipelines from multimodal agents
Detecting and counting objects in images from data extraction agents
not_for: Teams needing face recognition or identity-specific detection (privacy concerns)
Real-time video stream analysis (this is image-by-image detection)
best_when: An agent needs high-quality open-vocabulary object detection — DINO-X can detect nearly any describable object in an image, beyond fixed category classifiers.
avoid_when: You need simple image classification or face recognition, or have real-time video requirements.

auth.notes: DINO-X API key required from deepdataspace.com. Registration required. Free tier available for research use.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free tier for research use — limited monthly API calls
pricing.notes: From IDEA Research (academic/commercial). Free tier for research. Official MCP from IDEA-Research org.

performance.rate_limits: Tier-dependent; free tier has daily limits

known_agent_gotchas: API key registration required on deepdataspace.com — Chinese platform
Images are sent to external API — privacy consideration for sensitive images
Detection latency is 1-5 seconds per image — plan for async workflows
From IDEA Research (China) — data processed on Chinese infrastructure
Free tier rate limits can be restrictive for batch processing
Official MCP from IDEA-Research GitHub org — well-maintained
agent_readiness.security_notes: HTTPS enforced. Images sent to deepdataspace.com (China infrastructure). API key required. Do not send sensitive or private images. Official IDEA Research MCP.

security_score_components.security_notes: HTTPS. Images sent externally (China infra). API key. Don't send private images.
